sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince unconstrained geometric optimal portfolio method: derive optimal_f where second Lagrangian multiplier = 0 under sum-of-weights = 1 constraint; calculate daily AHPR and HPR standard deviation from non-detrended data only; apply leverage adjustment via E variable when constraint is relaxed. Specific optimal_f value not provided in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Use detrended data cautiously for position sizing, but always calculate daily AHPR and standard deviation from non-detrended data, and identify the unconstrained geometric optimal portfolio where the second Lagrangian multiplier equals zero when sum of weights equals 1.
